ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 导出日志

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the selected word count in the status bar next to Obsidian's built-in word count.
ast.target: 在状态栏中与 Obsidian 内置字数统计并排显示所选字数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Update the status bar count automatically when text is selected. (Requires status bar to be enabled)
ast.target: 选择文本时自动更新状态栏计数。（需要启用状态栏）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide Obsidian's built-in word count when the selected word count is enabled. (Requires status bar to be enabled)
ast.target: 启用所选字数统计时隐藏 Obsidian 内置字数统计。（需要启用状态栏）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize the label shown before the count in the status bar. (Requires status bar to be enabled)
ast.target: 自定义状态栏计数前显示的标签。（需要启用状态栏）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display character count alongside word count in the modal.
ast.target: 在弹窗中与字数统计并排显示字符数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how characters are counted. (Requires character count to be enabled)
ast.target: 选择字符计数方式。（需要启用字符数统计）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display sentence count alongside word count in the modal.
ast.target: 在弹窗中与字数统计并排显示句子数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include timestamps when displaying word count history in the modal.
ast.target: 在弹窗中显示字数统计历史时包含时间戳。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For [[Note Name|Alias]] links, only count "Alias". For [link text](url) links, only count "link text". • Property: exclude-urls
ast.target: 对于 [[Note Name|Alias]] 链接，仅统计“Alias”。对于 [link text](url) 链接，仅统计“link text”。• 属性：exclude-urls

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, code will be excluded from word, character, and sentence counts.
ast.target: 启用后，代码将不计入字数、字符数和句子数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude text within triple backtick (```) or tilde (~~~) code blocks. (Requires code exclusion to be enabled) • Property: exclude-code-blocks
ast.target: 排除三重反引号 (```) 或波浪号 (~~~) 代码块中的文本。（需要启用代码排除） • Property: exclude-code-blocks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude text within single backticks (`). (Requires code exclusion to be enabled) • Property: exclude-inline-code
ast.target: 排除单个反引号 (`) 内的文本。（需要启用代码排除） • Property: exclude-inline-code

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, file paths will not be counted as words.
ast.target: 启用后，文件路径将不计为单词。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude paths starting with drive letters (e.g., C:\). (Requires path exclusion to be enabled) • Property: exclude-windows-paths
ast.target: 排除以驱动器字母开头的路径（例如 C:\）。（需要启用路径排除） • Property: exclude-windows-paths

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude Unix-style paths starting with forward slash (e.g., /usr/local). (Requires path exclusion to be enabled) • Property: exclude-unix-paths
ast.target: 排除以正斜杠开头的 Unix 风格路径（例如 /usr/local）。（需要启用路径排除） • Property: exclude-unix-paths

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude network paths starting with double backslash (e.g., \\server\share). (Requires path exclusion to be enabled) • Property: exclude-unc-paths
ast.target: 排除以双反斜杠开头的网络路径（例如 \\server\share）。（需要启用路径排除） • Property: exclude-unc-paths

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude environment variable paths (e.g., %USERPROFILE%, $HOME). (Requires path exclusion to be enabled) • Property: exclude-environment-paths
ast.target: 排除环境变量路径（例如 %USERPROFILE%、$HOME）。（需要启用路径排除） • Property: exclude-environment-paths

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, comments will be excluded from word, character, and sentence counts. • Property: exclude-comments
ast.target: 启用后，注释将不计入字数、字符数和句子数。 • Property: exclude-comments

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude Obsidian-style comments from text analysis. (Requires comment exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 从文本分析中排除 Obsidian 风格的注释。（需要启用注释排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When unchecked, only the comment markers (%% %%) are excluded, but the content inside is still counted. (Requires Obsidian comment exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 未勾选时，仅排除注释标记（%% %%），但内部内容仍会计入统计。（需要启用 Obsidian 注释排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude HTML-style comments from text analysis. (Requires comment exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 从文本分析中排除 HTML 风格注释。（需要启用注释排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When unchecked, only the comment markers (<!-- -->) are excluded, but the content inside is still counted. (Requires HTML comment exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 未勾选时，仅排除注释标记（<!-- -->），但内部内容仍会计入统计。（需要启用 HTML 注释排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, markdown headings will be excluded from word, character, and sentence counts. • Property: exclude-headings
ast.target: 启用后，markdown 标题将从单词、字符和句子计数中排除。• Property: exclude-headings

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude only the # symbols but count the heading text. (Requires heading exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 仅排除 # 符号，但统计标题文本。（需要启用标题排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Exclude complete heading lines including the text. (Requires heading exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 排除包含文本的完整标题行。（需要启用标题排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, specific words and phrases will be excluded from word, character, and sentence counts. • Property: exclude-words-phrases
ast.target: 启用后，将从单词、字符和句子计数中排除指定的词语和短语。• Property: exclude-words-phrases

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of words to exclude (case-insensitive, exact matches only). (Requires words/phrases exclusion to be enabled)
ast.target: 要排除的词语列表（用逗号分隔，大小写不敏感，仅精确匹配）。（需要启用词语/短语排除）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable detailed logging for troubleshooting. May impact performance.
ast.target: 启用详细日志以便故障排查。可能影响性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow custom regex for word detection. For advanced users only.
ast.target: 允许自定义正则表达式用于单词检测。仅适用于高级用户。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define a regular expression pattern for word detection. Default: [A-Za-z0-9]+(?:[\u2018\u2019'-_][A-Za-z0-9]+)*
ast.target: 定义用于单词检测的正则表达式模式。默认值：[A-Za-z0-9]+(?:[\u2018\u2019'-_][A-Za-z0-9]+)*

ast.name: text
ast.target: 选择分析

ast.name: text
ast.target: ℹ️ 使用按笔记的排除覆盖

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can override any exclusion setting for individual notes by adding a cswc-disable property to the note's frontmatter:
ast.target: 你可以通过在笔记的前置元数据中添加 cswc-disable 属性来覆盖单个笔记的任何排除设置：

ast.name: text
ast.target:
---
cswc-disable: [exclude-urls, exclude-comments]
---

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用“all”可禁用所有排除：

ast.name: text
ast.target:
---
cswc-disable: all
---

ast.name: text
ast.source: Property values are shown next to each setting below (• Property: ...)
ast.target: 属性值显示在下方每个设置旁边（• 属性：...）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 行内注释覆盖

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can also disable exclusions for specific sections within a note using comments:
ast.target: 你也可以使用注释为笔记中的特定部分禁用排除：

ast.name: text
ast.source:
This text is excluded.
<!-- cswc-disable -->
This text is NOT excluded from counts.
<!-- cswc-enable -->
This text is excluded again.
